Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Champions

The University aims to provide a working and learning environment which is fair, welcoming and inclusive and where staff and students can fulfil their potential. The establishment of Equality, Diversity and Inclusion (EDI) Champions in each department is an important initiative for the University in support of this aim.

Find out more about the role, and who to contact in your department:

  • Terms of reference
  • List of EDI Champions
  • Equality Champions' Handbook
